common.appTitle: ดึ๋งปุ๊ Idle Game
common.appDescription: An idle adventure with 3 hero classes — clear waves, challenge bosses, and keep upgrading.

panels.upgradeAriaLabel: {name} Level {level}{costState, select, capped { (MAX)} other {, cost {cost} gold}}
panels.evolveAriaLabel: {heroName}: Evolve{state, select, locked { (unlocks at Lv.{level})} confirm { (tap again to confirm)} other {, cost {cost} gold}}

welcome.title: Welcome to ดึ๋งปุ๊!
welcome.body: Your hero team charges through enemy waves automatically. Your job is to keep upgrading them so they grow stronger. Let's take a look!

watchFight.title: Let your heroes fight
watchFight.body: Heroes attack enemies on their own. Every kill banks gold, and the bar below fills up toward the boss.

watchGrow.title: Grow stronger with every kill
watchGrow.body: Each enemy you defeat gives your hero XP. Keep clearing waves to level up — your hero gets stronger automatically!

castSkill.title: Cast a skill to help out
castSkill.body: Each hero has their own special skill. Tap a skill button when it's ready (no cooldown left) for a big burst of damage!

bossChallenge.title: Challenge the stage boss
bossChallenge.body: Once your team's power is ready, the Challenge Boss button lights up. Tap it to fight the boss and unlock the next stage!

settingsTour.title: Tune your play here
settingsTour.body: Speed up the game, mute/unmute sound, or switch between Thai/English anytime from this row.

outro.title: You're ready!
outro.body: That's the whole core loop: kill → bank gold → upgrade → grow stronger, on repeat. Enjoy the adventure!

heroDeathRespawn.title: Don't worry when a hero goes down!
heroDeathRespawn.body: A downed hero auto-revives after a short timer — no button to tap, just wait for the team to get back up and keep fighting.

autoUpgradeAvailable.title: Let auto-upgrade handle it
autoUpgradeAvailable.body: You've got enough gold for an upgrade now. Try flipping on "Auto upgrade" — it buys the next level the instant you can afford it, no more manual tapping.

autoCastAvailable.title: Try auto-cast for your skills
autoCastAvailable.body: A hero's skill is ready. Flip on "Auto skill" and heroes will cast automatically the instant their cooldown ends.

stageClear.title: Boss down! Stage cleared.
stageClear.body: Tap "Next stage" to unlock a new hero slot and push into a tougher stage.

bossWipe.title: The team got wiped — but it's not over!
bossWipe.body: Your heroes revive and go back to normal waves. Grind a bit more power, then challenge the boss again.

coreLoop.title: Kill → bank gold → upgrade → boss
coreLoop.body: Your hero team charges through enemy waves on its own, all the time. Every kill banks gold and pushes the kill counter closer to the stage's boss. Spend that gold on upgrades to make your team stronger, then challenge the boss to unlock the next stage. Then it loops again.

hero-swordsman.body: The Swordsman is your melee frontliner — auto-attacks whatever's directly in front, and has their own special skill usable once its cooldown is up (tap the skill button on the skill bar, or turn on Auto Skill to let it cast itself).

hero-archer.body: The Archer attacks at range with arrows, great for hitting enemies from behind the rest of the team, and has their own special skill usable once its cooldown is up (tap the skill button on the skill bar, or turn on Auto Skill to let it cast itself).

hero-mage.body: The Mage deals area-of-effect magic damage, great against grouped-up enemies, and has their own special skill usable once its cooldown is up (tap the skill button on the skill bar, or turn on Auto Skill to let it cast itself).

upgrade-atk.body: Increases every hero's attack power — more damage per hit, helping both wave clears and boss fights.

upgrade-speed.body: Increases attack speed (attacks land more often). This line has a maximum cap; once reached, the button shows MAX.

upgrade-hp.body: Increases every hero's max HP. A tankier team survives longer both clearing waves and dueling the boss.

autoUpgrade.title: 💰 Auto Upgrade
autoUpgrade.body: When on, the game automatically spends gold on the cheapest available upgrade the instant you can afford it — no manual buying needed.

boss.title: Challenging the stage boss
boss.body: The panel below the arena shows the boss's HP, attack power, recommended team power, and your team's current power. The Challenge Boss button unlocks once your power meets the recommended threshold. If your whole team dies, the boss retreats, your team is fully revived, waves resume, and you can challenge again right away. Winning pays out a big gold reward and unlocks the next stage.

gameSpeed.title: ⚡ Game speed
gameSpeed.body: Switch between 1×/2×/3× anytime from the settings row. The simulation stays exactly as accurate — it simply runs faster.

autoCast.title: ✨ Auto Skill
autoCast.body: When on, each hero casts their own skill automatically the instant its cooldown is ready — no need to tap the skill buttons yourself.

offlineIdle.title: Offline gold
offlineIdle.body: Close the game and come back later — it automatically calculates the progress you would have made while away (capped at 8 hours per session) and hands you the banked gold as soon as you return.

swordsman.name: Whirl Slash
swordsman.desc: Spins the blade to hit every foe in range

archer.name: Arrow Rain
archer.desc: Rains arrows across the whole battlefield

mage.name: Meteor
mage.desc: Calls down a meteor strike on the area
